rag_rules: Generate guarantee clauses for component implementation scope using only visible identifiers or locally declared eq/const helpers.
Use initialized temporal recurrence (e.g., initial_value -> pre(var)) for stateful behavior guarantees.
generic_rules: Apply logical operators (and, or, not, =>) to construct precise temporal or conditional contracts.
Ensure all expressions in guarantees have well-typed operands: comparisons yield bool, arithmetic yields int/real.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: guarantee "label": expression; must use valid AGREE syntax with parentheses for function calls and explicit type-aware comparisons.
Use initialized state variables to guard pre() references (e.g., initialized : bool = false -> true).
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Avoid generating guarantees with unresolved identifiers; delete clauses instead of inferring scope.
